================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D4 EE 9E A3 96
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x0B
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 14

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x0B
PayloadLen   : 14

[EPS P60] Unknown CC: 0x0B

[PAYLOAD HEX]
04 00 00 00 00 00 63 68 31 30 00 00 00 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
04 00 00 00 00 00 63 68 31 30 00 00 00 00 

[BINARY DATA]
